pi_items.source: Yahoo Finance and NASDAQ - Apple Inc. stock ticker symbol
NinjaTrader 8 documentation confirms Point & Figure is a valid bar type available in the platform
Point & Figure chart documentation confirms box size is a configurable parameter; 2 is a valid numeric value
Point & Figure charting standard - the 3-box reversal method is the most popular and standard reversal configuration
NinjaTrader 8 documentation lists Moving Average - Simple (SMA) as a standard system indicator
NinjaTrader documentation and trading practice - 20 is a commonly used and valid SMA period
NinjaTrader 8 support forum confirms standard workspace location is C:\Users\<username>\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces; env.json confirms user 'Docker' exists

pi_items.metadata_value: real daily OHLCV data available for AAPL
pi_items.source: import_data.ps1 script explicitly states 'Import Yahoo Finance historical data' and env.json describes 'real Yahoo Finance data'; AAPL.Last.txt contains 502 daily records from 2023-01-03 to 2024-12-31

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a Point & Figure chart for AAPL (Apple Inc. stock, NASDAQ ticker) using real Yahoo Finance daily OHLCV data spanning 2023-2024. Configuration parameters are: box size = 2, reversal = 3 (standard 3-box reversal method), indicator = Simple Moving Average with period 20 (both common technical analysis settings). Workspaces are saved to the standard NinjaTrader 8 directory at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces. All metadata values correspond to real, standard financial charting configurations.
